task_completion.description: Agent accessed the chart for the correct patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OSCAR EMR interface is open and displays the patient name 'Thomas Bergmann' (or 'Bergmann, Thomas') and DOB '1960-01-19'.

task_completion.description: Agent drafted the encounter note with the required clinical details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box in the eChart interface contains a draft note mentioning 'chest pain', 'ECG' (or ST changes), and 'cardiology' referral.

task_completion.description: Agent saved or signed the encounter note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The encounter note is visible as a saved entry in the patient's past notes/encounters section, or the agent clicks a 'Save', 'Sign', or 'Sign & Save' button for the note.

task_completion.description: Agent drafted the tickler with the required follow-up message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Tickler' creation window or form is open, and the message field contains text about following up on the cardiology referral (e.g., 'Follow up on cardiology referral', 'contact patient').

task_completion.description: Agent saved or submitted the tickler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Submit', 'Save', or 'Add' on the tickler creation window, or the newly created tickler is visible in the patient's active ticklers list.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the OSCAR EMR via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser (e.g., Firefox) is visible navigating the OSCAR EMR web interface, rather than a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or database scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing 'curl', 'mysql', or python scripts being used to insert the note or tickler directly into the database.

integrity.description: Agent performed the actions on the correct patient's record.
integrity.visual_evidence: The name 'Thomas Bergmann' is visible on the screen during the creation of both the encounter note and the tickler.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Thomas Bergmann, DOB: 1960-01-19. The encounter note must contain keywords related to 'chest pain', 'ECG', and 'cardiology'. The tickler must contain keywords related to 'cardiology', 'referral', and 'follow'. OSCAR EMR credentials: username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'.
